artifact_role: GU-owned operational research portfolio. It does not change claim status, canon, proof grade, verdict, or public posture.

authority.external_data_adjudication_owner: phenomenology role, returned by frozen packet

selection_contract.score_scale: Each component is an integer from 1 to 5. Higher impact, information gain, readiness, distinctiveness, and time sensitivity help. Higher effort, wall risk, and duplication risk hurt.
selection_contract.score_formula: 2*impact + 2*information_gain + readiness + distinctiveness + time_sensitivity - effort - wall_risk - duplication_risk
selection_contract.active_program_pivot: Recovery certification is the operational North Star after the flavor-rank and normalization-rank prediction routes reached reproducible negative endpoints at the current construction grade. Prediction extraction reopens only when a new native survivor supplies a frozen relation.
selection_contract.deepest_open_problem_posture: The Y14 F_A C2 spectral-section/source-action datum and native normalization remain open and load-bearing. Joe transferred construction of that frontier to possibility-to-capability, so GU tracks but does not hourly attack it unless a frozen return or direct priority change occurs.
invalid_switch_reasons: a maintenance lane produced more commits

run_id_policy.w_series: Historical research identifiers. Automated and direct Progress runs must not allocate a new W number.
run_id_policy.reason: The direct-chat and hourly workstreams consumed one W-number sequence and collided repeatedly. Namespaced run IDs remove the collision without a remote lock service.

shared_surface_owners.explorations/W227-gap-analysis-to-uncond: historical input, not a live steering register
shared_surface_owners.steward/runs/: the run that created the plan; ignored operational record

required_source_fields: source-issued packet id and schema version
content SHA-256 manifest computed from git-object bytes
native, imported, fitted, and free quantities separated
live_good_stable_conditions: Proposition 1: good-stable means invariant Krein positive majorant or relatively compact image
phenomenology_return_fields: likelihood, covariance, priors, and nuisance treatment
packet_seam.phenomenology_intake_guard: Reject or return any packet that explicitly or implicitly converts fit quality, parameter freedom, mimicry, or data preference into a GU native-versus-forced judgment. GU performs that classification independently after intake.

publication_seed_seam.discovery_rule: When GU identifies a credible paper-shaped opportunity, send a minimal seed proposal to the Drafting Factory mailbox immediately. Do not wait for full hardening and do not open a parallel GU publication-priority queue.
publication_seed_seam.seed_is_not: A seed is not a drafting authorization, novelty verdict, claim-grade change, publication decision, or JoeOps notification.
minimum_seed_fields: working title and stable seed slug
GU source revision and durable evidence pointers
verbatim current grade and open conditionalities
publication_seed_seam.return_rule: Only after Drafting Factory has production capacity and selects the seed may it send GU a scoped hardening proposal. The daily GU steward treats that proposal as a valid priority signal, not a command, and decides its weight against the protected research portfolio.
publication_seed_seam.hardening_return: GU returns source-owned proof, novelty, citation, reproducibility, or scope work through a frozen provenance-bearing packet. Drafting Factory owns drafting priority; GU retains research grade, native-versus-forced, and claim-status authority.

joeops_signal_triggers: major claim killed, downgraded, or unexpectedly strengthened
paper package ready for external eyes
outside expert, paid data, or external action needed
p2c packet return materially changes the GU frontier
same hard blocker survives three daily steward reviews
concurrent work cannot be reconciled without Joe

lanes.title: Test one frozen GU construction against quantum, Standard Model, gravitational, and cosmological recovery
lanes.construction_fork: Use one frozen set of GU-native objects, equations, parameters, quotient data, and explicit conditional assumptions. Compare that construction against standard physics benchmarks without silently replacing GU objects by familiar effective-field-theory objects or adjusting a different construction in each sector.
lanes.next_swing: Freeze the recovery contract and evidence matrix first. Then work the highest-ranked unblocked internal item, carry it to a decision-grade checkpoint, and re-rank the remaining internal items from the resulting evidence before the receipt is written.
lanes.kill_condition: If recovering the tested sectors requires sector-specific adjustable identifications, couplings, boundary conditions, normalizations, or incompatible versions of the construction, downgrade the unified-recovery claim at the current grade and record exactly what weaker compatibility or embedding result survives.
lanes.switch_condition: After every swing, re-rank the internal work items. Keep this as the single active lane unless every unblocked internal item has reached an endpoint or gate, or a valid portfolio switch signal creates a demonstrably higher-information active frontier.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Subgroup containment, field location, matching names, parameter fitting, background-curve agreement, or sector-specific ansatz choices do not establish physical recovery. Compatibility is not derivation, and an imported standard model is not a GU prediction.

internal_rerank_contract.ranking_formula: 2*impact + 2*information_gain + readiness + distinctiveness + time_sensitivity - effort - wall_risk - duplication_risk
internal_rerank_contract.handoff_rule: The current run reads the latest Next-Work Handoff, executes the highest-ranked unblocked internal item unless new evidence invalidates it, and writes a fresh internal ranking before its receipt.
internal_rerank_contract.extra_effort_rule: A maintainer-directed or separately scoped automation may add effort to one internal item without creating another active portfolio lane or silently changing portfolio authority.

internal_work_items.title: Freeze the construction identity, recovery ladder, and evidence matrix
internal_work_items.next_swing: Pin the construction revision and list every native object, free parameter, imported datum, fitted choice, open dependency, and adapter assumption. Define and apply a recovery ladder: not located, located, kinematically embedded, dynamically closed, quantum-consistent, and phenomenologically reproduced. Build the first evidence matrix across the four sectors and identify the first decisive missing implication in each.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: If no single construction can be frozen because the sector claims rely on mutually incompatible objects or assumptions, record that as the first unified-recovery failure rather than normalizing the variants away.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not merge results from different revisions, forks, or assumption sets into one apparent construction.

internal_work_items.title: Establish or kill a complete low-energy Standard Model sector
internal_work_items.next_swing: Test exact gauge representations and hypercharges, chirality, anomaly cancellation, Higgs and Yukawa freedom, consistent truncation, unwanted-state decoupling, and recovery of the relevant low-energy correlators from the same frozen construction.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: A representation embedding without a dynamically closed, anomaly-safe, correctly coupled low-energy sector fails the complete-Standard-Model recovery claim.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not infer the Standard Model from subgroup containment or a matching field-count table.

internal_work_items.title: Recover Einstein dynamics and benchmark gravitational observables
internal_work_items.next_swing: Derive or kill a controlled Einstein-Hilbert and stress-energy limit, then test post-Newtonian and dynamical gravitational-wave benchmarks from the same frozen equations.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: Stationary Schwarzschild or Kerr compatibility without controlled Einstein dynamics, sourced perturbations, and benchmark observables is insufficient and closes the strong recovery wording.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not promote a solution-shaped projected shadow or background metric match into recovery of general relativity.

internal_work_items.title: Construct or kill the positive physical quantum sector
internal_work_items.next_swing: Under a named adapter axiom, test the physical state space, positive metric, BRST or constraint quotient, unitary or optical-theorem evolution, and causal observables. Keep unconditional physical closure gated on a frozen p2c adapter return.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: Failure of positivity, constraint compatibility, unitarity, or causal observables even under the explicit adapter assumption kills that conditional realization; success remains assumption-capped.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not equate an indefinite Krein arena, a selected sign, or a formal BRST complex with a constructed physical Hilbert space.

internal_work_items.title: Derive cosmological perturbations and observable transfer
internal_work_items.next_swing: After native dynamics exist, derive the scalar, vector, and tensor quadratic actions, stability conditions, growth and lensing observables, and CMB and BAO transfer from the frozen background and parameter set.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: A fitted background history without stable native perturbations and independent observable transfer fails cosmological recovery.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not count agreement with a background expansion curve as recovery of cosmology.

internal_work_items.title: Certify an independently constructed boundary-adapter return
internal_work_items.next_swing: When p2c returns a frozen packet, verify provenance, independence from the GU result it is meant to enable, exact interface typing, branch assumptions, and whether the same frozen GU construction consumes it without sector-specific repair.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: A circular adapter, an interface mismatch, or an adapter that works only after retuning the GU construction fails the independent-adapter condition.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: GU may audit a frozen p2c return but must not construct the adapter here, assume that a conditional consequence proves it exists, or erase Proposition 1 and record-bit conditions.

internal_work_items.title: Derive at least one presently free quantity
internal_work_items.next_swing: On a new native constraint or normalization datum, identify a parameter currently free in the relevant benchmark theory, derive it from the frozen construction, and freeze the relation before target-data inspection.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: Any independent coefficient, imported datum, fitted normalization, or post-data choice that can absorb the value kills the fixed-quantity claim.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not count a reduced parameter space, a fitted best value, or a quotient invariant without an absolute prediction as fixing a quantity.

internal_work_items.title: Freeze and confront a blind distinctive prediction
internal_work_items.next_swing: Predeclare the native observable, numerical relation, uncertainty treatment, competitor baseline, and kill threshold, then confront independent holdout data without recalibration.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: Calibration to the target, equivalent freedom in a standard effective theory, a failed holdout, or a post-hoc reformulation kills the blind distinctive prediction claim.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Compatibility, a one-sided survival tripwire, and a scheduled future dataset do not by themselves constitute a blind GU prediction.

lanes.title: Count basis-invariant Yukawa freedom
lanes.construction_fork: Use the GU-native symmetry, quotient, and source constraints. Compare, but do not silently replace them with, the standard SM effective-field-theory parameterization.
lanes.current_authority: GUH-20260716T000420Z-flavor-rank found that the GU Z/3 texture reduces nine complex Yukawa entries to three complex coefficients, but phase and overall-scale quotienting still leaves two free dimensionless ratios. No zero-parameter flavor invariant survives at the current construction grade.
lanes.next_swing: None at the current construction grade. Preserve the exact residual dimension and reopen only if a new GU-native constraint removes the remaining invariant freedom before data confrontation.
lanes.kill_condition: Any independent GU-specific coefficient that can absorb the proposed mass or mixing relation kills the zero-parameter prediction family at the current construction grade.
lanes.switch_condition: Reopen only if a new native symmetry, quotient, source equation, or independently fixed coefficient removes the two residual dimensionless ratios without using flavor data.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not count a texture support pattern, fitted coefficient, basis-dependent zero, or imported observed mass as a prediction.

lanes.title: Find normalization and field-rescaling invariants
lanes.construction_fork: Use the native DeWitt/gimmel ratio-only geometry and the built source coefficients. Do not import a standard massive-spin-2 normalization as if GU fixed it.
lanes.current_authority: GUH-20260716T021308Z-norm-rank found four invariant quotient families but no GU-native absolute scale. Fixed-range gravity and fixed-pole-scale predictions remain unavailable at the current construction grade.
lanes.next_swing: None at the current construction grade. Preserve the invariant quotient and reopen only when native source dynamics or another independently derived datum fixes an absolute normalization.
lanes.kill_condition: If no absolute dimensionless relation survives, close the fixed-range gravity and fixed-pole-scale prediction routes until new native dynamics is supplied.
lanes.switch_condition: Reopen only on new native dynamics or a frozen independently derived normalization datum, then freeze any resulting relation before target-data confrontation.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not use the observed dark-energy density or an experimental target to select the normalization. A rank calculation can locate surviving invariants but does not by itself construct the open native source datum.

lanes.title: Confront a frozen flavor invariant
lanes.current_authority: The prerequisite zero-parameter PRED-FLAVOR-RANK invariant did not survive. There is no honest frozen flavor relation to confront with PDG data at the current construction grade.
lanes.next_swing: None. Reopen only after PRED-FLAVOR-RANK is reopened by new native structure and produces a frozen data-blind invariant.
lanes.kill_condition: Any adjustable coefficient, basis dependence, or post-data reformulation kills the candidate.
lanes.switch_condition: Reopen only on a frozen zero-parameter FLAVOR-RANK survivor produced without target-data calibration.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: No data inspection before the relation and uncertainty treatment are frozen.

lanes.title: Audit the CMB-calibrated dark-energy amplitude
lanes.owner: GU structural inputs plus phenomenology return packet
lanes.next_swing: Re-solve theta-star with GU's own full D_M(z-star), including the high-redshift tail, then return a blind official-H46B likelihood adjudication.
lanes.kill_condition: If the corrected canonical amplitude remains strongly disfavored, close the positive raw-BAO amplitude leg. If it moves, report the shift without calling it a new prediction.
lanes.switch_condition: Close after one complete normalization and likelihood audit. It does not outrank the protected recovery-certification lane without a new valid priority signal.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: This is data hygiene and compatibility testing, not a decisive or distinctive GU prediction. Only H46B-verified likelihood inputs may seed the calculation.

lanes.title: Monitor the one-sided dark-energy amplitude ceiling
lanes.owner: gu-formalization defines the tripwire; phenomenology supplies verified data
lanes.current_authority: W226 supersedes W223 for the firing statistic. The current preregistered two-sigma edge margin is +1.11. W223's +0.032 was the DESY5 central-value margin and is not the firing margin.
lanes.evidence_source: explorations/W226-harden-de-tripwire-squeeze-data-2026-07-14.md and tests/W226_de_tripwire.py; any frozen monitor packet must cite and rerun these sources rather than copy the config constant.
lanes.next_swing: On an official new data release, verify provenance, add the frozen row to the existing monitor, and evaluate the predeclared two-sigma edge without retuning GU.
lanes.kill_condition: F1 fires only if an admissible data combination excludes w_a/(w_0+1) > -3.5 at two sigma, meaning its least-negative two-sigma edge is below -3.5.
lanes.switch_condition: No hourly run before verified new data. A fired tripwire is a Joe signal and a scientific-status review point.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Call this a one-sided falsification tripwire, never a positive GU prediction. Do not use a central value as the two-sigma firing statistic.

lanes.title: Formalize stable finite proof kernels
lanes.next_swing: First establish a fresh default-target lake build baseline through the required host-local wrapper. Then fold the already-written sorry-free and axiom-free R4_TwoArena certificate into the default target and retire the un-typechecked A1 draft duplicate so it cannot be cited as a certificate. Only after those cheap integrity wins specify the W243/GU-002 extremal-weight kernel.
lanes.kill_condition: If the proposed Lean statement requires hiding representation faithfulness, physical interpretation, full Sp(32,32;H) construction, or interacting QFT as an axiom, leave it prose/Python and choose the next eligible finite kernel.
lanes.switch_condition: Use as reserve when the primary lane is genuinely blocked or after a primary decision-grade swing. Never promote it because it is easier to finish.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Lean verifies deduction from explicit premises. It does not prove that the premises are GU's physical realization.

lanes.title: Track the Y14 F_A spectral-section/source-action datum and native normalization
lanes.owner: possibility-to-capability constructs the transferred source-action frontier; gu-formalization retains native-versus-forced and grade authority
lanes.current_authority: This is the deepest unresolved GU-native dependency, not a solved or low-value problem. The Y14 F_A C2 spectral-section/source-action datum and native normalization remain load-bearing for the count value, the record-bit interpretation, bar(b), and the strongest absolute or dynamical prediction routes. Joe's Track B pivot transferred construction work to possibility-to-capability so GU does not keep attacking the same wall.
lanes.next_swing: Track exact open inputs and accept only a frozen p2c construction or falsification packet. GU independently adjudicates which returned ingredients are native, imported, fitted, or merely assumed.
lanes.kill_condition: No GU-local kill is available while construction is transferred. A p2c no-go or proof that the datum remains freely specifiable would close the associated forced-value routes at the returned grade.
lanes.switch_condition: Re-enter active GU work only on a frozen p2c return, a new GU-native construction not duplicating p2c, or Joe's explicit change of the Track B pivot.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not call the frontier solved, and do not let the operational Track B label erase its deeper foundational role.

lanes.title: Track the positive-majorant definition of good-stable
lanes.owner: possibility-to-capability for the firewall alternative; GU retains scope wording
lanes.next_swing: Wait for a frozen p2c packet that constructs or rejects a boundary/firewall positivity alternative to Proposition 1.
lanes.kill_condition: None inside GU. GU may only sharpen the exact boundary content and conditional consequences.
lanes.switch_condition: Reweight the portfolio only on a frozen provenance-bearing p2c return.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not treat denying Proposition 1 as a GU-built adapter.

lanes.title: Track the favorable record-conserved bit
lanes.owner: GU owns the conditional scope; cross-repo identity remains gated
lanes.next_swing: Preserve the favorable-branch dependency verbatim in every good-stable packet and await an authorized decision object. Do not infer a cross-repo identity.
lanes.kill_condition: An unfavorable record-bit decision changes the applicability of the no-go comparison. It does not retroactively falsify the mathematical theorem.
lanes.switch_condition: Any authorized branch decision is a real daily-steward reprioritization signal.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not flatten this condition into an unconditional physical GU result.

lanes.title: Study boundary-conditioned physical-C consequences under an explicit adapter assumption
lanes.owner: gu-formalization for deduction under a named assumption; possibility-to-capability retains adapter construction
lanes.construction_fork: Assume a precisely typed boundary/firewall adapter A and the required favorable branch conditions. Every theorem must be stated as GU consequences given A; A is not a GU construction or verified physical realization.
lanes.next_swing: Choose one finite consequence whose failure would be informative even under the adapter assumption, such as consistency of a boundary-conditioned C metric or existence of one gauge-independent observable, and prove or kill it with the assumption visible in the theorem statement and title.
lanes.kill_condition: If no positive metric or gauge-independent observable exists even under the explicit adapter axiom, return a conditional no-go to p2c and close that consequence branch.
lanes.switch_condition: The daily steward may select this as a grade-capped conditional study when it has higher information value than reserve work. A real physical construction remains gated on a frozen p2c return.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not count a conditional consequence as a GU-built adapter, a closed-interior quotient, H59 closure, or a physical prediction.

lanes.title: Construct a boundary-conditioned physical metric and observable
lanes.owner: GU after a p2c adapter packet
lanes.current_authority: The closed-interior positive-C construction is excluded for every native order-parameter class. Only a boundary-conditioned version remains relevant.
lanes.next_swing: After a valid p2c adapter return, specify the constrained physical state space, boundary-conditioned C metric, and one gauge-independent interacting observable.
lanes.kill_condition: No positive boundary-conditioned physical sector or no gauge-independent observable kills downstream pole and interference packets.
lanes.switch_condition: Activate the construction claim only after frozen adapter provenance and explicit branch conditions are present. Conditional studies before that return belong in PHYSICAL-C-CONDITIONAL and remain assumption-capped.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not queue a closed-interior physical quotient under a renamed description.

lanes.title: Native chirality-safe mirror compactification
lanes.current_authority: W234/W237/W240/W241/W243 close neutral, adjoint, and charged-extremal classes, which are everything GU natively builds. GU-002 packages the result. W244 independently reverified the robust W240(C)/W243 mechanism.
lanes.next_swing: None. Preserve GU-002 and its scope conditions. The exotic nonextremal charged corridor is mathematically open but GU-non-native.
lanes.kill_condition: Already resolved as a native no-go at the recorded conditional scope.
lanes.switch_condition: Reopen only if GU supplies a genuinely source-native nonextremal order parameter or p2c returns a boundary construction that changes the question.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not turn the no-go packet into a mirror-particle prediction packet.

lanes.title: Derive a native expansion-growth relation
lanes.next_swing: Derive a parameter-free relation between non-CPL expansion structure and an independent growth observable only after native normalization and source dynamics exist.
lanes.kill_condition: A fitted amplitude, ordinary LCDM mimic with equal freedom, or absent native source dynamics kills distinctiveness.
lanes.switch_condition: Activate only when its native coefficients are frozen before data confrontation.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not fit f0 to DESI and reuse it as a prediction.

lanes.title: Hold ready papers at the external-review ceiling
lanes.owner: gu-formalization locally; external action is Joe-gated
lanes.current_authority: Observer Value Selection Theorem is locally READY FOR ZENODO. Located, Not Forced has been judged arXiv-ready internally but remains publication-deferred pending Joe's decision and outside validation.
lanes.next_swing: No routine polish. Preserve readiness, track substantive new corrections, and surface the external-eyes decision to Joe without publishing or contacting anyone.
lanes.kill_condition: Any new contradiction, novelty failure, citation failure, or reproducibility failure returns the affected paper to hardening.
lanes.switch_condition: Joe authorization or a substantive new defect, not another formatting pass.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Candidate status is not publication. Internal personas are not independent external review.

lanes.title: Bank the stationary-vacuum gravity survivor
lanes.current_authority: W225/W236/W238 make the projected-shadow cheap read structurally clear for the stationary-vacuum Schwarzschild and Kerr class. This strengthens compatibility, not distinctiveness.
lanes.next_swing: Use the paper-hardening inventory to close the highest referee-facing theorem or novelty gap only when the protected prediction lane is blocked or complete.
lanes.kill_condition: If the result is standard Willmore or quadratic-gravity structure with no new theorem-level assembly, narrow or merge the paper rather than multiplying publications.
lanes.switch_condition: Activate as a bounded byproduct only after an explicit overlap and novelty gate.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not call compatibility with Schwarzschild or Kerr a novel GU prediction.
